title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. subglabra
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. subglabra, also known as the wild rose or Scotch rose, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. subglabra include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. The plant's herbal preparations include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
